title: Cereals (Sale) Ordinance Repealed by Act II of 2015
text:
CEREALS (SALE) [CAP. 8.
CHAPTER 8
CEREALS (SALE) ORDINANCE
To make provision respecting the sale of cereals.
9th July, 1839*
ORDINANCE IX of 1839.
Repealed by Act II of 2015.
*See Proclamation No. VII of the 9 July, 1839.
2 [CAP. 8. CEREALS (SALE)
